notes: Projection sheet mobile redesign. Sticky first column + first row so labels/months always visible during scroll. Smaller text and padding on mobile (≤768px). All section headers collapsible (Account Balances, Inflows, Outflows, Surplus & Allocation, Running Balances, Cash Balance). EMI rows grouped under one 'EMIs (4)' summary in Outflows; Investment rows grouped under 'Investments (7)' in Running Balances. On mobile, Running Balances + EMI group collapse by default. Tap any section header or group summary to expand/collapse.
